n: Book 3, Chapter 3: Halbarad of the Dúnedain

steps.t: Rangers charged with the defence of Sarn Ford can use your assistance. Halbarad also requested that you recover a few caches of supplies from nearby, …
Meneldir is at Sarn Ford, where he is helping his kin recover from the recent attack.
The earth has been kicked up at several locations near Sarn Ford, and Meneldir thinks you should examine some of those piles of dirt. He has a suspici…
Meneldir's hunch proved accurate: the black riders left a token behind, and it likely drew the wights to Sarn Ford in the days following their attack.
Halbarad is overseeing the recovery of the Dúnedain following the black riders' attack on Sarn Ford. You retrieved a number of Ranger caches and shoul…
